issue.title: Extract validation logic from controllers
issue.context: Validation logic is currently scattered across controller actions. This makes it hard to test and reuse. We need to centralize validation in dedicated modules.
acceptance_criteria: Controller actions call validators instead of inline validation
New validator unit tests cover edge cases
constraints: Don't change the API contract - same error response format
Extract incrementally - one controller at a time
Keep existing changeset validations for Ecto models
